---
type: entity
created: 2026-06-15
updated: 2026-06-15
sources:
  - "[itu-t-l-1480-greening-by-digital](../sources/itu-t-l-1480-greening-by-digital.qmd)"
  - "[ITU-T L.1500 (Adaptation Framework)](../sources/itu-t-l-1500-adaptation-framework.qmd)"
tags:
  - "organization"
aliases:
  - "Study Group 5"
  - "SG5"
---

## Related Entities
- [International Telecommunication Union](international-telecommunication-union.qmd)

## Related Concepts
- [Recommendation ITU-T L.1480](../concepts/recommendation-itu-t-l-1480.qmd)
- [Recommendation ITU-T L.1500](../sources/itu-t-l-1500-adaptation-framework.qmd)
- [Greening by Digital](../concepts/greening-by-digital.qmd)
- [International Standards](../concepts/international-standards.qmd)
- [Climate Change Adaptation](../concepts/climate-change-adaptation.qmd)

## Mentions in Source

> **Source: ITU-T L.1480 (Greening by Digital)**
> - "The approval of ITU-T Recommendations is covered by the procedure laid down in WTSA Resolution 1."
> - "In either case, if compliance with this Recommendation is claimed, practitioners are encouraged to send a copy of the report to the ITU-T SG5 Secretariat (tsbsg5@itu.int) for information."

> **Source: ITU-T L.1500 (Adaptation Framework)**
> - "The World Telecommunication Standardization Assembly (WTSA), which meets every four years, establishes the topics for study by the ITU‑T study groups which, in turn, produce Recommendations on these topics."
> - "Edition 1.0, ITU-T L.1500, 2014-06-22, Study Group 5, Unique ID 11.1002/1000/12138."
